And so when you write the note, you can be like, hey, talk about sleep multiplier if they're having sleep issues, or like, hey, I'm not getting motivated to work out, talk about pre-workout. So you can always solve the problem that they're presenting with in product that can actually solve it. And I've learned this myself. If I gave people interventions like, hey, I need to turn your iPhone off 30 minutes before bed or an hour before bed and no TV, I need you to read something. If I paired that with a product and they purchased it, the likelihood that they're in the intervention. And so it helps if you tie an intangible intervention with a tangible product, they put them together. All right?
